article_title: ASP.NET Core Web API 集成测试：用 WebApplicationFactory 跑完整 HTTP 管线
core_theme: 用 WebApplicationFactory 在内存中启动 ASP.NET Core 应用，替换生产依赖后编写可隔离的集成测试。
reader_takeaway: 读者可以理解 WebApplicationFactory 的作用，并掌握测试宿主、依赖替换、认证伪造、数据库隔离和 xUnit 组织方式。
summary_angle: 把生产 API 管线搬进测试台：内存宿主承载真实 HTTP 流程，测试侧替换数据库和外部服务，再用请求断言验证行为。

information_blocks.source_anchor: WebApplicationFactory<TEntryPoint> boots Program.cs, builds DI, wires middleware, and exposes an HttpClient without opening a real socket.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 透明测试舱中运行一条简化 API 管线。

information_blocks.source_anchor: CustomWebApplicationFactory removes production DbContextOptions and registers SQLite in-memory plus fake external services.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 数据库和外部服务被替换为测试替身。

information_blocks.source_anchor: Tests send GET and POST JSON requests, then assert status codes and response bodies.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 请求面板展示 GET、POST、200 和 JSON 响应。

information_blocks.source_anchor: IAsyncLifetime and fixture cleanup keep tests isolated and avoid test pollution.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 测试数据在运行前后被种子和清理动作包围。

main_metaphor: 一个运行 ASP.NET Core API 管线的透明实验测试舱。
primary_subject: 透明测试舱中的 API 管线
subject_action: 测试探针向管线注入请求并读取断言结果
composition: 单点聚焦，左右辅助信息块水平推进
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: European clear-line comic style, precise outlines, flat readable colors, tidy environments, restrained humor and detail
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；清线风适合表达教程流程和测试台结构，信息密度清楚不过载。
style_safety_note: 该风格为泛类型描述，不涉及特定品牌、工作室或在世艺术家复刻。
draft_goal: 验证 WebApplicationFactory 测试宿主、依赖替换、HTTP 请求断言和状态隔离四个叙事节点是否清楚。
revision_targets: 避免真实架构图或仪表盘
final_prompt: Use case: infographic-story. Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes an article about testing ASP.NET Core Web APIs with WebApplicationFactory, integration tests, authentication fakes, in-memory databases, and xUnit fixtures. Summary angle: Turn the production API pipeline into a contained test bench: boot the app in memory, replace risky dependencies, send HTTP requests, and keep tests isolated. Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with European clear-line comic style, precise outlines, flat readable colors, tidy environments, restrained humor and detail. Visible text: 测试宿主, 替换依赖, 请求断言, 隔离状态. Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics.
